name: Control Baselines for Information Systems and Organizations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Control Baselines for Information Systems and Organizations. NIST publication NIST.SP.800-53B.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from the NIST-published XLSX (sp800-53B-control-baselines.xlsx). One row per control/enhancement with baseline membership flags (Low, Moderate, High, Privacy). Output: 800-53b-r5-baselines.csv and .json with 1,189 entries. The companion marker-extracted PDF markdown remains in this dir for narrative reference.

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.

extraction_history.reason: Added structured XLSX-sourced extraction (CSV/JSON) alongside the existing marker markdown
